channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Out of control': Frontline doctors describe Ebola outbreak
item.description: Physicians at the center of the Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo told ABC News the virus continues to spread at an alarming rate.

item.title: Major blaze and suspected explosion level Dallas apartment building
item.description: At least one individual was taken to the hospital, according to Dallas Fire-Rescue.

item.title: UK says nearly 500,000 Russian soldiers have died in Ukraine war
item.description: This is the highest official estimate of Russian military deaths from any government since the conflict began.

item.title: Inflation hits highest level in nearly 3 years, Fed's preferred gauge shows
item.description: Inflation rose for the second straight month as the Iran war pushed gas prices higher.
